title: Haven Fates Client
description: Optimized Vanilla With Mods for Builders and QOL Mods
body:
This pack is built around a powerful core of optimization mods including Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, C2ME, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, ImmediatelyFast, VMP, and more, ensuring smoother gameplay, higher framerates, and reduced stuttering.

Enhance your world's beauty with Iris Shaders support (shaders must be added separately!), Continuity for connected textures, Enhanced Block Entities, and further visual tweaks via Sodium Extra and Reese's Sodium Options.

Express yourself with integrated player emotes and animations, chat heads, and voice chat. Customize your gear with Tool Trims and Elytra Trims.

For builders and creators, WorldEdit, the advanced Axiom mod, and the Armor Stand Editor provide powerful tools. Capture your best moments with Replay Mod and Flashback. Essential utilities like ModMenu, EMI (recipe/item viewer), and Where Is It? round out the experience.

Extra Mods To Work best with Haven Fates Server
